description: Cancel a cron job previously scheduled with CronCreate. Removes it from the in-memory session store (and, when durable cron is enabled, from .claude/scheduled_tasks.json). Idempotent: deleting an unknown id reports 'not found' without raising.

id.description: The 8-character job ID returned by CronCreate.

observed_returns: No scheduled jobs (when listing after delete)
Failed to remove scheduled task '<id>' (when id does not exist)
notes: Source-of-truth strings extracted verbatim from the local claude binary: var GC="CronDelete"; AW8="Cancel a scheduled cron job by ID"; buildCronDeletePrompt contains the full prompt block.
CronDelete is the only way to cancel a recurring cron job before its 7-day expiry; one-shot jobs self-delete after firing.
